title: melissa glandulosa
intro: Melissa glandulosa, also known as lemon balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Melissa glandulosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in topical applications such as creams and salves.
